name: Audit Evidence Collection
description: Automated audit evidence collection workflow that gathers artifacts across systems for compliance audits. When triggered before an audit engagement, the playbook systematically collects access control evidence, change management logs, system configurations, and security scan results. Riggs AI reviews and organizes the evidence package, then routes it through compliance lead approval before packaging for the auditor.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Splunk
required_integrations.reason: Collect log evidence and security event data for audit review

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Document evidence collection and create audit package ticket

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify compliance team when evidence package is ready for auditor

config.description: Manually triggered to begin audit evidence collection for an upcoming audit engagement

config.query: SELECT u.user_id, u.email, u.role, u.department, u.last_login, u.mfa_enabled, p.privilege_name, p.granted_date, p.last_reviewed FROM users u JOIN user_privileges p ON u.user_id = p.user_id WHERE u.status = 'active' ORDER BY u.department, u.role
config.description: Collect current access control matrix including user roles, privileges, MFA status, and review dates

config.query: SELECT change_id, system_name, change_type, requestor, approver, approval_date, implementation_date, rollback_plan_exists, post_change_review FROM change_management_log WHERE implementation_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '{{trigger_1.audit_period_days}} days' ORDER BY implementation_date DESC
config.description: Collect change management records covering the audit period

parameters.query: index=vulnerability_scans earliest=-{{trigger_1.audit_period_days}}d | stats count by severity, scan_type, remediation_status | sort -count

config.description: Collect vulnerability scan results and remediation status for the audit period

config.additional_instructions: Review and organize the collected audit evidence. Identify any gaps in documentation, missing artifacts, or areas where additional evidence may be needed. Compile an executive summary of the evidence package contents and completeness.
config.description: AI-powered review and organization of the audit evidence package
Compliance lead reviews and approves the evidence package before delivery to the auditor
Create a Jira ticket documenting the completed evidence package for the audit
Notify compliance team that the evidence package is ready for the auditor
Audit evidence collection complete -- package compiled, reviewed, approved, and documented
